use_cases: Switching between different content sections or views within a single page
Organizing large amounts of content into horizontally scannable categories
Creating dashboard navigation with draggable tab selection
Building product feature or settings categorization interfaces
Implementing segmented controls for filtering or view modes
ai_summary: A horizontally scrollable tab navigation component with drag-to-scroll functionality for seamless navigation between multiple content sections. Features mouse drag and wheel-based horizontal scrolling, making it ideal for interfaces with many tabs that need to adapt to various screen sizes.
